title: Copper Aging Controller
description: Control how copper blocks oxidize in your world. Speed up, slow down, or completely freeze the aging process of all copper blocks.
body:
# Copper Aging Controller

Take **complete control** over Minecraft's copper oxidation mechanics with this lightweight, performance-friendly datapack. Perfect for builders and redstone engineers who want precise control over their copper's aging process.

## ✨ Features

- **Three aging modes** - Toggle between normal, accelerated (4x speed), or frozen aging
- **Simple trigger commands** - No complex configuration files needed
- **Performance optimized** - Efficient tick-based detection that only runs when necessary
- **Zero overhead** - Minimal impact on server or single-player performance
- **Builder-friendly** - Keep copper structures looking fresh or achieve weathered aesthetics faster

## 🎯 Perfect For

- **Builders** who want consistent copper coloring across projects
- **Redstone engineers** needing reliable copper bulb behavior  
- **Server owners** seeking lightweight customization options
- **Anyone** who appreciates aesthetic control over their world

Transform your copper experience with clean, efficient functionality that respects your gameplay while adding meaningful customization options.
